name: Worn Hilt Choice
desc: "Is this a tavern?" We walk into what seems to be a bar of sorts, its guests rowdily drinking and chatting about in groups. We find a seat to relax, but another group that was sitting nearby approaches us. "What's going on here? I haven't seen your faces around here before..." "This is a good day, boys—let this one slide. Don't stir up unnecessary trouble." "Yes, dame! Of course, dame!" That's when we realize that they're all carrying swords with them. Swords engraved with elaborate cloud patterns. "Did you hear about that new Syndicate that sprang up today?" "Ah, the... the group that primarily uses spears, right...?" "Dumbasses. Swords are the most superior form of weaponry there is, the apex of arms. And they use spears instead? "Let's all be completely honest here, guys. Sure, we're a Thumb subsidiary, but there's just something badass about a sword, huh? Way cooler than fists or guns." "Good thing we have these fine people here to give us a most fair assessment on the superiority of swords. We feel their gaze simultaneously turning to look at us.

options.message: Are swords really all that, though?
result:
"Let's put 'em six feet under. Let's go."

"Tsk, it's not like we seriously think that swords are actually the best weapons in the world."

"Look around ya, see anyone without a sword? Learn to read the room."

"Looks like you pissed off my boys. Would it have hurt to pretend to go along with them?"

"I think I'll head out now. Remember what I said earlier—don't start trouble and leave them alone."

"Yes, dame!"

As soon as the person who appeared to be their leader left the room, things became a lot more tense all of a sudden...

We quietly and carefully excused ourselves and left the place.

options.message: Swords are indeed the king of all weapons. Hail!
options.messageDesc: Lust & Pride Advantage check. Pass to gain a Slash E.G.O Gift.

1.title: You know your stuff
successDesc:
"Now ain't that the truth!"

"Ha ha! Yeah, it's not like we're saying that other weapons suck. It's just that there's something really cool about swords, am I right?"

"Blades are indeed quite impressive to look at. Am I right, boys?"

The bar fills with cheers and hollers of its patrons at {0}'s decision.

Just as we were about to bid them goodbye, after sharing our passionate thoughts on this particular brand of bladed instruments...

... the woman who appeared to be their leader left something on the desk.

"Thank you for indulging them. Why don't you take these with you, for your troubles?"
failureDesc:
"The king of weapons, huh? That's cool, but... I think you laid it on a little thick with the compliments."

"Yeah... almost like your heart's just not in it."

"Yeah, did you really have to hail it, too?"

Maybe {0} went a bit overboard with compliments.

Some of them are looking over at us with an awkward expression.

"Well... alright. I get what you mean. Swords are indeed the best, hm?"

Their boss pours {0} a drink.

It must've been unexpectedly delicious; {0} quickly emptied the cup.
